description: Fuse GitHub PR + CI state with git-level conflict analysis so spidersan drives the merge train. Today every authoritative merge call bypasses spidersan for raw gh + git merge-tree.
nonGoals: Auto-classify CI red as flake vs real — surface staleness, human judges
Reimplement GitHub — reuse gh via src/lib/github.ts

phases.name: Commands (parallel, disjoint files; NO command-registry.ts edits)
Integration (single agent, owns shared files + green build)

tasks.title: register commands, barrel, changelog, version, build/typecheck/lint/test green
registrationPoints: src/lib/ai/reasoner.ts KNOWN_SPIDERSAN_COMMANDS Set (parity-tested by tests/reasoner.validator.test.ts — discovered during Phase B; add merge-plan/pr-check/verify-trunk)

registers.name: merge-plan
registers.description: Ordered merge plan for open PRs (fuses PR + CI + real git conflicts)

registers.name: pr-check
registers.description: Check a PR's merge readiness (stacked base, red/behind state)

registers.name: verify-trunk
registers.description: Detect registry trunk-poison (main/master must claim no files)

tasks.gate: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:run

acceptance: build + typecheck + lint + test:run all green on feat/pr-coordination
tests/bin-command-registry.test.ts passes with 3 new commands (descriptions synced verbatim)
merge-plan reproduces the 2026-06-16 golden verdicts: #175 MERGE, #179 BLOCKED (CheckoutScreen.tsx), #181 WAIT stacked-on-#179
conflicts --real distinguishes same-file-different-region (clean) from real conflict
pr-check flags stacked/red; verify-trunk flags + --fix resets trunk poison
no edits to main; CHANGELOG + version bump present; this STATE.json updated to done
getMergeConflicts treats merge-tree exit-1 (conflict) as a RESULT via thrown-error stdout, not a failure; only bad-ref/not-a-repo become error
parser fixtures cover modern + legacy merge-tree: content, add/add, delete/modify, rename, paths-with-spaces
conflicts --real (no --all) works with NO .spidersan/registry.json; only --all requires an initialized registry; existing conflicts options unregressed
merge-plan threads repo into every gh call; filters open PRs; fork-safe head via pull/<n>/head or headRefOid; topo edges parent->child with a test that #179 precedes #181
version bump updates BOTH package.json and package-lock.json
bin-command-registry.test.ts green with 3 new COMMANDS entries (descriptions verbatim)

orchestration.preStep: A0 (DONE): execGit exported from src/lib/git.ts so A3 (trunk.ts) is independent of A1.
orchestration.collisionRule: Phase A/B agents write ONLY their listed files; ALL shared-file edits happen in Phase C. No per-agent worktrees needed.
barriers: A before B (B imports A exports)
B before C (C wires B modules)

risks: gh not authed in agent env -> isGhAvailable guard + degrade gracefully
old git without --write-tree -> dual-path analyzer legacy fallback
mergeStateStatus UNKNOWN async -> re-poll once then report honestly
registry description drift -> Phase C copies .description() verbatim

knownIssues.summary: Legacy git merge-tree parser (git<2.38 only) under-reports marker-less conflict classes (modify/delete, rename/*) -> false-negative. Modern --write-tree path is always taken on git>=2.38 and is correct. Fleet is on git 2.50, so impact ~nil. Fix deferred; would need legacy modify/delete + rename semantics.

qaLog.fixed: BUG-1 parseWriteTreeConflicts path truncation (regex now terminates on multi-word phrases) + 2 regression tests (modify/delete keyword path, rename/delete)

qaLog.note: Integration complete and fully green. Registered merge-plan/pr-check/verify-trunk in command-registry.ts (descriptions copied verbatim from each command's .description()), added barrel exports to commands/index.ts, and added all three to KNOWN_SPIDERSAN_COMMANDS in reasoner.ts (reasoner.validator.test.ts parity now passes). Version bumped 0.10.0 -> 0.11.0 in package.json + package-lock.json. CHANGELOG [0.11.0] and README updated. Gate: build + typecheck + lint + test:run all green; --help shows the 3 new commands and each loads cleanly.
